entity.label: Hammon
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the tribe of Asher, near Zidon (Josh. 19:28), identified with ‘Ain Hamul.

nodes.label: Hammon
nodes.description: A town in the tribe of Asher, near Zidon (Josh. 19:28), identified with ‘Ain Hamul.

verses.text: And Hebron, and Rehob, and Hammon, and Kanah, even unto great Zidon;
And out of the tribe of Naphtali; Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, and Hammon with her suburbs, and Kirjathaim with her suburbs.
